rows.label: qev041401_MSG0001
rows.name: Elder! Are you alright, mo?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0002
rows.name:
*Cough*... It hurts, mo. I am suffering, mo...
But no one cares if Nun disappears anyway, mo... *Cough*...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0003
rows.name:
I would rather just disappear without suffering, mo...
*Cough*... *Cough*...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0004
rows.name:
You cannot be so pessimistic, mo!
Thinking like that will only make your illness worse, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_JNK0010
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev041401_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask about Nun's illness.

rows.label: qev041401_JNK0020
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev041401_SEL0021
rows.name: Express concern for Nun's illness.

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0005
rows.name:
He has been coughing constantly lately...
His condition is terrible, yet he has completely shut himself away in depression, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0006
rows.name:
Passerby, you are very kind, mo...
If the other Nopon had even that much kindness, the Elder's condition would not have worsened this much, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0007
rows.name:
Oh, that is right... Ngogo is completely exhausted from nursing the pessimistic Elder, mo.
If you do not mind, I would like you to listen to my story, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0008
rows.name: This person is completely useless right now, but he is actually the highly respected Elder who manages the Nopon, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0009
rows.name: But during the recent general assembly, he proposed to the Nopon scattered across the regions that since things are dangerous lately, we should all gather in NLA and live together, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0010
rows.name:
He was absolutely torn to shreds over it, mo.
They even told him that an Elder who abandons traveling is no longer a Nopon, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0011
rows.name:
The shock from that made him bedridden, mo.
He grumbles every day about wanting to disappear, and it is a terrible burden on his attendant, Ngogo, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0012
rows.name:
Do you not think Ngogo is incredibly pitiful, mo?
Please sympathize with me, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_JNK0030
rows.name: Sympathize

rows.label: qev041401_SEL0031
rows.name: Sincerely sympathize with Ngogo.

rows.label: qev041401_JNK0040
rows.name: Criticize

rows.label: qev041401_SEL0041
rows.name:
Criticize Ngogo's claim, stating that you
sympathize more with the Elder.

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0013
rows.name:
You are a person who understands, mo.
I would love to go out for a quick drink with you after work sometime, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0014
rows.name:
If he wants to disappear, he should just disappear, mo!
Ngogo, who has to listen to that constantly, is much, much more of a tragic heroine, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0015
rows.name:
...That is right, mo!
You are going to help Ngogo with a grand fireworks operation to cheer up the Elder, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0016
rows.name: If the Elder remains depressed like this, Ngogo is going to lose his energy too, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0017
rows.name:
I am begging you, mo. All you have to do is collect contracts from the Nopon in various regions, mo.
It is such an easy job, even a Nopopotamus could do it, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0018
rows.name:
It is a deal, mo!
If this grand surprise operation succeeds, the pessimistic Elder should cheer up a little bit, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0019
rows.name:
*Cough*... Ngogo.
I have heard everything you have been saying, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0020
rows.name:
Nun is not pessimistic... *Cough*!
I do not need anyone to cheer me up, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0021
rows.name:
That was a careless slip, mo.
But oh well, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0022
rows.name: Anyway, please go tell the Nopon in the caravans across each area to launch fireworks for the Elder, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0023
rows.name: Ah... but verbal promises cannot be trusted, so I want you to make sure to get them written down as contracts, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0024
rows.name: Also, if possible, I want you to drag along the Elder's grandson, Potepote, who is the leader at the caravan in the Black Steel Continent, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0025
rows.name: He might be at the end of his lifespan, so I want his family to be by his side for his final moments, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0026
rows.name:
Hey! Do not kill people off without permission, mo!
*Cough* *Cough*...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0027
rows.name:
Besides... they are all the ones who abandoned Nun and left, mo.
There is no way they would do something like that... *Cough*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_JNK0050
rows.name: Cheer

rows.label: qev041401_SEL0051
rows.name: Try to boost Nun's spirits by saying that is not true.

rows.label: qev041401_JNK0060
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev041401_SEL0061
rows.name: Fall silent, agreeing that it might be true.

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0028
rows.name:
*Cough*... I cannot trust anyone anymore, mo...
I will just quietly disappear like this, mo.
You do not need to do anything pointless, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0029
rows.name:
*Cough*... I understand it perfectly well, mo.
Everyone absolutely hates Nun, mo.
I want to disappear, I want to disappear, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0030
rows.name:
You do not need to worry about the grumblings of an old man, mo.
Now then, hurry up and depart, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0047
rows.name: There are Nopon caravans in the Nightglow Forest, the Valley of Oblivion, the White Tree Continent, and the Black Steel Continent, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0048
rows.name: Please go fetch them quickly while Ngogo skillfully ignores the Elder's grumbling here, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0049
rows.name: ...Ah, and do not forget to bring his grandson, Potepote, from the caravan in the Black Steel Continent, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0050
rows.name:
Thank you for bringing Potepote, mo!
Look, just look at the two of them, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0051
rows.name:
Grandpa, hurry up and give me food, mo!
Also, it is boring if you just sleep all the time, mo.
I want you to do something fun, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0052
rows.name:
*Cough* *Cough*...
What in the world did you really come here for, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0053
rows.name: ...It seems the Elder has regained a bit of his energy now that his grandson has returned, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0054
rows.name:
Now, I think he will be able to go to heaven without regrets as long as the fireworks go up, mo.
Did you gather all the contracts, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0055
rows.name: Ooh! These are definitely all genuine, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0056
rows.name:
Nopon do not really keep verbal promises, but they absolutely honor what is written in a contract, mo.
With this, our preparations are complete, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0057
rows.name:
Then I will take the Elder to a spot with a good view in front of BLADE Tower, mo.
Please hurry and come join us, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0059
rows.name:
Thank you for bringing Pissa, mo!
Despite everything, it seems he has regained his energy, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0060
rows.name:
Pissa, there is some dust stuck on you there, mo.
Here, let me get that off for you, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0061
rows.name:
Eek...!
Elder, where are you touching, mo!
N-n-no! Please stop it, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0062
rows.name:
*Cough* *Cough*!
It hurts, mo. Nun is a sick patient, mo.
Please do not be so angry, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0063
rows.name:
...He is as terrible an Elder as ever, mo.
But it feels like he is getting back into form, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0064
rows.name:
Now, I think he will be able to go to heaven without regrets as long as the fireworks go up, mo.
Did you gather all the contracts, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0065
rows.name: Ooh! These are definitely all genuine, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0066
rows.name:
Nopon do not really keep verbal promises, but they absolutely honor what is written in a contract, mo.
With this, our preparations are complete, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0067
rows.name:
Then I will take the Elder to a spot with a good view in front of BLADE Tower, mo.
Please hurry and come join us, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0070
rows.name:
He must surely have been blown away somewhere in the Black Steel Continent, mo.
It might be tough to find him, but please go take a look, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0071
rows.name:
How was it, mo?
Was Potepote safe and sound, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0072
rows.name:
...I am glad above all else that he returned to his caravan, mo.
The Elder also seems to have perked up a bit after meeting Pissa, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0073
rows.name:
There was some trouble, but everything is resolved now, mo.
I will give you your proper reward just as we contracted, so please accept it, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0074
rows.name:
Come to think of it, Pissa contacted me earlier, mo.
She said she is going to become something called a "fashion model" in this city, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0075
rows.name:
It sounds like fun, which is nice, mo.
Ngogo would also like to quit babysitting the Elder and walk a new path in life, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_JNK0090
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev041401_SEL0091
rows.name: Recommend that it is better to start sooner rather than later.

rows.label: qev041401_JNK0100
rows.name: Disagree

rows.label: qev041401_SEL0101
rows.name: Reprimand him, saying he must focus on his current job.

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0076
rows.name:
You are a very encouraging person, mo!
But the Elder is near the end of his lifespan anyway, so I will stick with this job for just a little while longer, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041401_MSG0077
rows.name:
You are very stubborn, mo!
Well, the Elder is near the end of his lifespan anyway, so I will stick with this job for just a little while longer, mo.[ST:wait ]
